hero.title: We Are Sawalancer
hero.description: A cosmic creative agency dedicated to transforming brands through innovative design, strategic thinking, and cutting-edge technology.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To launch brands into new dimensions through creative excellence and strategic innovation.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading cosmic creative force that shapes the future of digital experiences.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Creativity, Innovation, Excellence, and Client Success drive everything we do.

items.title: Creativity First
items.description: We push boundaries and think outside the galaxy.

items.title: Excellence Always
items.description: Delivering nothing less than stellar results.

items.title: Client Centric
items.description: Your success is our cosmic mission.

team.subtitle: Our Team
team.title: Meet the Cosmic Crew
team.description: A team of passionate designers, developers, and strategists ready to launch your brand to the stars.

members.bio: With over 15 years of experience in brand strategy and design.

journey.title: Our Cosmic Journey
journey.description: From a small creative studio to a leading cosmic agency, our journey has been nothing short of stellar.

milestones.description: Sawalancer was founded with a vision to bring cosmic creativity to brands.
